description: Per-user cohort for dev-example-project-game: first_seen, last_seen, active_days, D-N returning. Continuous transform syncs every 1h on @timestamp with 60s delay. Day-boundary math uses scripted_metric/script params.tz (default Asia/Seoul). To switch timezone, change every params.tz value to a ZoneId string (e.g. 'UTC', 'America/Los_Angeles') and run './apply.sh --replace'. Retention horizons are params.offset_days (D-1=1, D-7=7); add new scripted_metric entries with different offsets to extend (D-14, D-30, ...).

scripted_metric.reduce_script: long first = Long.MAX_VALUE; HashSet set = new HashSet(); for (def s : states) { for (def d : s) { long dl = (long)d; set.add(dl); if (dl < first) first = dl; } } return set.contains(first + ((long)params.offset_days)) ? 1L : 0L;

long first = Long.MAX_VALUE; HashSet set = new HashSet(); for (def s : states) { for (def d : s) { long dl = (long)d; set.add(dl); if (dl < first) first = dl; } } return set.contains(first + ((long)params.offset_days)) ? 1L : 0L;
